purpose: A navigational text element that takes the user to another page, view, or external URL. Distinct from Button (which triggers actions).
whenToUse: For navigation between pages or to external URLs
In tables to navigate to detail views
doRules: Use Link for navigation between pages or external URLs
Use descriptive text that makes sense out of context
Mark external links with an icon or indicator
Use Subtle variant in secondary contexts
dontRules: Do not use Link for actions — use Button
Do not use "click here" as link text
Do not style arbitrary text blue to imitate Link — use the component

layoutGuidance.placement: Inline within text; in toolbars; in table cells.

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Link text describes destination — avoid "click here"
External links announced as opening in new window

exceptions: Emphasized variant for key inline references
